Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 56 9.4 ELECTRICAL SYSTEM (FOR EACH UNIT) Sl. No. Description Quantity 9.4.1 Generator and Auxiliaries 9.4.1.1 Generator i) Gaskets of all type (one set should include all types and sizes of gaskets for one generator and auxiliaries) 1 set ii) Insulating packer below slot wedges 50% of slot nos. iii) Ripple springs 50% iv) Liners (Insulating material below the retaining rings) 1 set v) Spacers (Insulating material below the retaining rings) 1 set vi) Generator bearings for Turbine End (TE) and Exciter End (EE) (complete with torous, intermediate pieces and all other fixing/ assembly material required to complete one TG unit except housing) 1 set vii) Oil guard rings spare for TE and EE bearings 1 set viii) Brush holder of each type
